ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "gof" REAL /* Goodness of Fit metric */,
  "test_gof" REAL /* Test Goodness of Fit metric */,
  "param_a" REAL /* Parameter A value */,
  "param_b" REAL /* Parameter B value */,
  "param_eps" REAL /* Epsilon parameter */,
  "cv_itr" INTEGER /* Cross-validation iteration */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time taken to test the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for this performance record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the dataset */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the dataset */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model-dataset association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model or dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "param_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES model_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_annotations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
